author: Jdthomas24
description: Advanced Hubitat battery monitoring with analytics, trends and replacement tracking. Recurring scan schedule, confidence-weighted health, EWMA smoothing.
releaseNotes: v2.4.8 - Global notification snooze added. Silence all notifications for a configurable number of days — useful when traveling or away from home. Snooze status shown on main page with remaining time and one-tap clear.
